transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I want to know if pre-existing conditions like hypertension will be covered under cashless at your clinic.
AGENT: Great question. Coverage for pre-existing conditions depends entirely on your specific policy and how long you've held it. Most policies cover pre-existing conditions after a waiting period of 2-4 years.
CALLER: My policy is 5 years old. I'm with ICICI Lombard.
AGENT: ICICI Lombard is in our network. With a 5-year-old policy, hypertension-related treatment is likely covered, but please confirm with ICICI Lombard directly to be certain, as exclusions vary by plan.
CALLER: And your insurance desk can help if I bring the policy documents?
AGENT: Absolutely. They'll coordinate with ICICI Lombard on your behalf. Please come Monday to Saturday between 9 AM and 5 PM.
CALLER: Thank you very much.
